---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
labels: enhancement
---

## Is this related to a problem you're experiencing?
<!-- A clear description of what the problem is. E.g. "I can't prevent myself from opening Instagram after 10 pm..." -->

## Describe the feature you'd like
<!-- A clear, concise description of the feature. -->

## Describe alternatives you've considered
<!-- Other approaches you've thought about. -->

## Why would this benefit other users?
<!-- Help us understand the broader use case. -->

## Additional context
<!-- Screenshots, mockups, links to similar apps, etc. -->

---

> **Note:** The following are explicitly out of scope for v1 and will be closed:
> website/browser blocking, cloud sync, remote/family controls, iOS, daily time limits.
> See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#out-of-scope) for details.
